message:
fix(security): add domain separators to SHA-256 hashes in migration pipeline

Continuation of hash collision hardening — adds `|` byte separators
between concatenated fields in all SHA-256 computations within the
connector migration pipeline:

- compute_idempotency_key: separators between cohort_id, extension
  names, source versions, and target versions — prevents collisions
  when extension boundary shifts align field bytes

- generate_plan: separators in pre/post state hashes (name|version)
  and plan fingerprint (target|pre_state_hash|post_state_hash)

- issue_receipt: separators in pre-migration hash (name|version pairs),
  post-migration hash (pre_hash|"migrated"), and signature hash
  (pre_hash|plan_fingerprint|post_hash)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
